pi_items.source: Verified from task description and verifier scripts (export_result.sh looks for $:/tags/ViewTemplate). This is the standard TiddlyWiki tag for custom view templates.
Verified from task description and verifier.py which awards points for the presence of the 'backlinks[' filter operator.
Verified from setup_task.sh which injects the 'Evergreen Notes' tiddler and export_result.sh which explicitly checks the rendered HTML of this tiddler to confirm conditional logic for linked notes.

Verified from setup_task.sh which injects the 'Orphan Note' tiddler and export_result.sh which explicitly checks its rendered HTML to ensure the backlinks footer is not displayed for notes without incoming links.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated TiddlyWiki notes injected via setup_task.sh. The expected ViewTemplate tag is '$:/tags/ViewTemplate' and the expected filter operator is 'backlinks[]'. The setup provides 'Evergreen Notes' as the test case for a tiddler with incoming links, and 'Orphan Note' as the test case for a tiddler with no incoming links, which is used by the verifier to dynamically test conditional visibility logic.
